body_txt: Essentially, this is when the theme tune of a particular show is written, sung or both by a member of the cast or someone else involved in the show in an otherwise non-musical context. Distinct from Diegetic Soundtrack Usage in that the theme may or may not actually appear in the show in an "in-universe" context, but in the real world it is written/sung by the real person. In the Idol Genre , that are all about showcasing Idol Singers , it's expected that the voice actors will be performing the theme tune. Sub-Trope of Five-Man Band Concert . See also Image Song .
